hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)"; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo); [ "$branch" = "main" ] && exit 0; last_msg=$(git log -1 --pretty=%s 2>/dev/null || echo); case "$last_msg" in *"[auto-dist]"*) exit 0;; esac; if ! ./scripts/build-dist.sh >/tmp/rprun-build-dist.log 2>&1; then echo "build-dist.sh failed (see /tmp/rprun-build-dist.log):" >&2; tail -20 /tmp/rprun-build-dist.log >&2; exit 1; fi; git add -f dist.zip 2>/dev/null || true; if ! git diff --cached --quiet -- dist.zip 2>/dev/null; then git commit -m "Update dist.zip [auto-dist]"; fi'
